query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sector, p.priority, p.projectState, COALESCE(bl.score, 0) as pa_score FROM projects p LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bl ON bl.projectId = p.id AND bl.scoringDimension = 'Portable Air' WHERE p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS') AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm') AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0) AND p.sector IN ('mining', 'oil_gas', 'defence') ORDER BY COALESCE(bl.score, 0) DESC LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sector, p.priority, p.projectState, COALESCE(bl.score, 0) as pa_score FROM projects p LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bl ON bl.projectId = p.id AND bl.scoringDimension = 'Portable Air' WHERE p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS') AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm') AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0) AND p.sector IN ('mining', 'oil_gas', 'defence') ORDER BY COALESCE(bl.score, 0) DESC LIMIT 20
